hero_sub: UP2CLOUD helps businesses modernise infrastructure, automate delivery, reduce cloud costs, and deploy secure platforms faster — with AI-assisted execution across FinOps, DevSecOps, Kubernetes, and multi-cloud operations.
services_sub: From cloud strategy to AI automation — we bring the expertise to modernize your infrastructure and accelerate growth.
svc1_sub: Move workloads to AWS, Azure, or GCP with zero-downtime strategies and cost-optimized multi-cloud architectures.
svc2_sub: Tailored technology roadmaps, IT audits, and executive advisory services that align tech with your business objectives.
svc3_sub: Accelerate delivery securely — automated pipelines, Kubernetes, Terraform IaC, and security embedded at every stage of the SDLC.
svc4_sub: Comprehensive security audits, penetration testing, SIEM implementation, and compliance consulting (GDPR, ISO 27001).
svc5_sub: Reimagine business processes, enable AI-driven workflows, and build the agile foundation for continuous innovation.
svc6_sub: Stop overspending on cloud. We implement FinOps frameworks, automated cost governance, and visibility dashboards that cut cloud waste.
ai_sub: From OpenClaw deployment to AI workflow automation — we cut resolution time from days to minutes.
openclaw_desc: We install and configure OpenClaw — the AI-powered personal assistant platform — across your entire organisation. OpenClaw connects AI to your tools, workflows, and communication channels, automating repetitive tasks and resolving issues in real time.
aiagents_desc: Beyond a single agent — UP2CLOUD designs and deploys coordinated AI agent teams that collaborate autonomously across your infrastructure, codebase, and business workflows. Each agent has a defined role, memory, and toolset; together they form a 24/7 digital workforce.
ai_pillar1_sub: AI-assisted diagnostics cut mean time to resolution from hours to minutes across all incident types.
ai_pillar2_sub: Custom AI agents that handle repetitive IT tasks autonomously — from provisioning to reporting.
ai_pillar3_sub: AI-powered anomaly detection predicts failures before they happen — keeping your systems always healthy.
ai_pillar4_sub: A coordinated crew of specialist AI agents running your ops autonomously around the clock.
oc_demo1_desc: OpenClaw identified root cause, freed 40 GB of stale logs, and notified ops team — resolved in 47 seconds.
oc_demo2_desc: OpenClaw traced the failure to a misconfigured env variable, auto-patched the pipeline config, and re-triggered deploy — team never paged.
oc_demo3_desc: OpenClaw detected a runaway Lambda loop, stopped it, estimated $4,200/month savings, and generated an optimisation report — in 2 minutes.
oc_feat1: Full setup across Mac, Windows, and Linux — all platforms handled
oc_feat2: Integration with Slack, Teams, WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord & iMessage
oc_feat3: Custom AI workflow design — automate your team's most repetitive tasks
oc_feat4: Private & secure — your data stays on your infrastructure
agt1_desc: Monitors cloud spend 24/7, flags anomalies, auto-creates rightsizing tickets.
agt2_desc: Receives alerts, correlates logs, proposes root cause, auto-creates Jira tickets.
agt3_desc: Scans IaC, container images, and IAM policies on every commit. Blocks misconfigs before deploy.
agt4_desc: Validates PRs, triggers pipelines, monitors rollouts, and auto-rolls back on error spikes.
agt5_desc: Compiles weekly engineering health reports, SLO summaries, and cost digests — delivered to Slack.
agt_feat1: Specialised roles — dedicated agents for FinOps, incident triage, security scanning, deployment, and reporting.
agt_feat2: Agent collaboration — agents delegate tasks, share context, and only escalate to humans when genuinely needed.
agt_feat3: Integrates with your stack — GitHub, Jira, Slack, PagerDuty, AWS, GCP, Azure, Datadog and more.
agt_feat4: Measurable ROI — track hours saved, incidents auto-resolved, and cost anomalies caught.
offshore_sub: Cut engineering costs by up to 60% without sacrificing quality. UP2CLOUD sources, vets, and manages high-calibre cloud & software engineers across Asia-Pacific — fully integrated into your workflows.
offshore_service_desc: We manage the full cycle — from sourcing talent in India, Philippines, Vietnam, and Australia to onboarding, tooling, timezone alignment, and ongoing management. You get a battle-tested cloud team without the direct-hire overheads.
offshore_step1_sub: We map your exact role requirements, then source candidates from our APAC network — only senior-level, cloud-native engineers with proven production experience.
offshore_step2_sub: UP2CLOUD handles contracts, tooling setup, security onboarding, and async communication frameworks so your new team is productive from week one.
offshore_step3_sub: We provide ongoing technical leadership, performance reviews, and scaling support. Add engineers as demand grows — no agency fees, no long-term lock-in.
off_bullet1: Pre-vetted engineers — cloud, DevOps, FinOps, and platform roles. Senior-level minimum.
off_bullet2: 24/7 coverage — APAC time zones complement EU/US teams for always-on operations.
off_bullet3: Fully managed — UP2CLOUD provides technical leadership. You stay in control, we handle the day-to-day.
off_bullet4: IP & security compliance — NDAs, data residency controls, and ISO 27001-aligned practices from day one.
off_savings_sub: on equivalent engineering headcount vs EU/US hiring
portfolio_sub: UP2CLOUD is led by Cesar A. Nogueira, a Cloud DevOps Engineer with 10+ years building and scaling infrastructure across three continents.
testimonials_sub: Real recommendations from LinkedIn — colleagues at H&M, ZeroLight, Accenture, CI&T and more.
